**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Xinlinfei Energy Technology Co., Ltd. (branded as Sunrev) is a major player in the solar photovoltaic (PV) and new energy sector. Originally established as 'Tianjin Shuangjie New Energy', the company undertook a massive strategic relocation to Gaoyou, Yangzhou (Jiangsu Province), a key manufacturing hub for China's renewable energy supply chain. Its staggering registered capital of ~324M RMB (with ~314M RMB paid-in) signals a heavy-asset, capital-intensive manufacturing base. The company specializes in PV equipment, electronic materials, and solar power generation technology, positioning itself as a vertically integrated tier-1 manufacturer in the global green energy transition.
